fire_jurisdiction_config.ahj_name: CAL FIRE / Mariposa County Fire Department
fire_jurisdiction_config.data_source: EvidLY JIE Fire AHJ Research â€” Batch 1
fire_jurisdiction_config.permit_type: Operational Fire Permit (county) + NPS Commercial Use Authorization (federal) for park
fire_jurisdiction_config.ahj_split_note: CRITICAL: Yosemite NPS sites = NPS Fire Management AHJ (federal). Aramark kitchen locations inside park = dual compliance required. Outside park in Mariposa County = CAL FIRE only.
fire_jurisdiction_config.amendment_notes: CAL FIRE/Mariposa County. DUAL JURISDICTION for Yosemite NPS locations: NPS Fire Management (federal) + CAL FIRE/Mariposa (county) both apply. Aramark Yosemite locations must comply with BOTH.
fire_jurisdiction_config.inspection_trigger: Annual routine + NPS permit compliance for park locations
fire_jurisdiction_config.suppression_inspection: Semiannual by licensed fire protection contractor
fire_jurisdiction_config.federal_overlay_details: NPS Fire Management (Yosemite) enforces federal fire standards under 36 CFR. Commercial kitchen operators within Yosemite NPS boundary must comply with both NPS requirements and NFPA 96.
